source_name: DCCEEW State and Territory Greenhouse Gas Inventories

fields.primary_source_document: DCCEEW State and Territory Greenhouse Gas Inventories (annual).
fields.keying_plan: Key Mt CO2-e per state for the most recent year. NSW and QLD are typically the largest emitters (electricity-driven); WA's profile is gas/LNG-fugitive-heavy. Annual lag ~12-18 months.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual state emissions Mt CO2-e. Each state has its own net-zero target alongside the federal 2050 commitment; the federal STGGI gives a comparable baseline.
citation: DCCEEW, State and Territory Greenhouse Gas Inventories.
